formal_statement: If coherent domain size decreases, basal reflections broaden and peak maxima become less sharply defined.
diagnostic_implication: Broad 00l peaks may reflect finite N rather than mixed-layering.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns

formal_statement: A steep G squared slope across Phi can produce asymmetric tails and apparent peak displacement.

source.source_book: X-Ray Diffraction and the Identification and Analysis of Clay Minerals
source.chapter_or_appendix: Chapter 3 / Appendix: Modeling One-Dimensional X-Ray Patterns
source.quote_fragment: Peak asymmetry is caused by steep slopes
